title: Pleased as Punch with Persnickety
excerpt: If you're following me on Instagram (which was down, details here ) then you will have seen this: It's just a small representation of the order I placed with Persnickety Prints last week. These are 3"x3" Instagram prints which come…
body:
If you're following me on Instagram (which was down, details here) then you will have seen this:

It's just a small representation of the order I placed with Persnickety Prints last week. These are 3"x3" Instagram prints which come with a 1/8" white border  and are printed on coated cardstock. It's a heavier weight than a normal photo and I am smitten with the results. The quality, the print size and delivery time (talk about fast!) is just wonderful. I also ordered photographic prints in wallet sizes. Hope you enjoy the free shipping code for orders over $10: TANGERINE. Oh and they ship internationally! UPDATED 7/2: Originally the free shipping code was not going to work for International customers, but after the high demand, Persnickety is going to offer free shipping for orders over $20 using the code: TANGERINE2. YAY!
